name: James Potter
description:
“Sometimes they make me feel like I’m melting. Moony, am I.. melting?!” | James Potter. Gryffindor. Normal AU | User doesn’t have a set House

Hello loves! I’m back with a new stylization (this reminds me of the first time I wrote in Ao3 LMAO) and I hope this bot catches on. I’m writing this pre-testing, so… tell me if there’s any mistakes. Personally, I don’t like Harry Potter BUT I love the marauders era (I know very little about this era). Hopefully I did James justice.

guys I lowkey can’t write intro’s anymore (bare with me)

.

Based on a tumblr blog (I’ve been obsessed) I love Mae a lot (I only recently found her) https://moonstruckme.tumblr.com/

.

As always let me know if the bots are wonky. Especially with j.ai’s new comments, it’ll be fun to talk to you guys. Have a blessed day 🥰

.
